scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.tauri:build:unsigned: npm run build && npm run prepare:sidecar && npm run prepare:server-deps && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build && npm run prepare:sidecar && npm run prepare:server-deps && bash scripts/sign-native-addons.sh && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin && npm run generate:latest-json
